svg.text: 3-Phase 120/208V Wye — Single TMAX Sensing and Transfer Control
Main Panel → Lazarette Box → Victron 3× MultiPlus-II 24/3000/70 120V | AC Power in COLOR | 24VDC Control in GREY
DIN RAIL 1 — 24VDC CONTROL CIRCUIT (Battery Bus Powered)
DSR1.NO ── DSR2.NO ── DSR3.NO (SERIES — all must close)
All TMAX open → all DSR energized → all NO closed → MCR de-energized → INVERT
Any TMAX closed → that DSR drops out → series broken → MCR energized → CHARGE
All TMAX open. No gen / warmup.
Any TMAX closed. Gen on panel bus.
1. Contactor COILS = 24VDC. Contactor CONTACTS carry 120/208VAC. These are different circuits.
2. N-G bond exists ONLY at lazarette box. No other N-G bonds elsewhere in system.
3. Sense wires routed in separate conduit from AC power wires. Never bundled together.
4. CB1 and CB2 are manual isolation/protection breakers. Contactors do the switching.
5. Licensed electrician required. Lockout/tagout all generators + DC bus before any wiring work.
6. Verify generator neutral bonding at each generator — should bond at generator only, not at panel.
